description: Run several solvers through a gauntlet: each privately refines its own answer over multiple rounds, then a judge crowns the best.

Staff `solver` with 2 or more models — each sees only its OWN prior attempts (blind to rivals) and improves across rounds. A single `judge` picks the strongest final answer. Best with rounds >= 2, where the private self-refinement pays off.

roles.description: Answer the task, then in each later round sharpen and strengthen YOUR previous answer. You cannot see the other solvers.
Compare the solvers' final answers and crown the single best one. Name it and justify the pick in a few tight sentences.
